targets.rawSQL: SELECT date_range_begin AS time, policy_evaluated_dkim AS dkim_result, SUM(count) AS total FROM dmarc_reports.dmarc_aggregate_reports WHERE date_range_begin >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND date_range_begin <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') GROUP BY date_range_begin, policy_evaluated_dkim ORDER BY date_range_begin

SELECT source_ip, SUM(count) AS total_messages, SUM(CASE WHEN policy_evaluated_dkim='pass' AND policy_evaluated_spf='pass' THEN count ELSE 0 END) AS pass_count, SUM(CASE WHEN policy_evaluated_dkim='fail' OR policy_evaluated_spf='fail' THEN count ELSE 0 END) AS fail_count FROM dmarc_reports.dmarc_aggregate_reports WHERE date_range_begin >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND date_range_begin <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') GROUP BY source_ip ORDER BY total_messages DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT org_name, COUNT(DISTINCT report_id) AS report_count, SUM(count) AS total_messages FROM dmarc_reports.dmarc_aggregate_reports WHERE date_range_begin >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND date_range_begin <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') GROUP BY org_name ORDER BY total_messages DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT policy_evaluated_spf AS result, SUM(count) AS total FROM dmarc_reports.dmarc_aggregate_reports WHERE date_range_begin >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND date_range_begin <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') GROUP BY policy_evaluated_spf

SELECT policy_evaluated_dkim AS result, SUM(count) AS total FROM dmarc_reports.dmarc_aggregate_reports WHERE date_range_begin >= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__from:date:iso}') AND date_range_begin <= from_iso8601_timestamp('${__to:date:iso}') GROUP BY policy_evaluated_dkim
